SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-17-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-17-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFFS ELYANE ZACHARY AND DERRICK LOOCKHART ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY DAVID HANDLY. DEFENDANT TAQI AYESH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS DISMISS THEIR CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION. PLAINTIFFS WAIVE SERVICE OF DEFENDANT TAQI AYESH'S AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZACHARY, ELYANE LOCKHART, DERRICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AYESH, TAQI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
